name: On-Chain Analytics & Whale Tracking
description: Analyze blockchain data for trading signals: whale wallet tracking, exchange inflows/outflows, large transaction alerts, DeFi TVL monitoring, and smart money movement detection.
prompt: Analyze blockchain data for trading signals: whale wallet tracking, exchange inflows/outflows, large transaction alerts, DeFi TVL monitoring, and smart money movement detection using free APIs (Etherscan, DefiLlama, Blockchain.com).
